positions.title: Quality Engineer
highlights: Main PiC for regression testing of an iOS-based AI User Assistant system, investigating test failures through root cause analysis
Debug, maintain, and enhance automated test scripts, frameworks, and internal CI/CD pipelines integrated with GitHub Actions
Maintain and extend a Python/Streamlit-based internal tool with new features, automating tester workflows and cutting process time by more than 2x
details: Communicate test reports to client and operations manager for fast-paced deliverables
Serve as team test script reviewer to maintain code quality and flexibility
Work with and develop AI-assisted tools to streamline output evaluation and reviews

positions.title: QA Automation Engineer
highlights: Led QA automation strategy and vendor team coordination for a real-time Japanese bicycle racing betting platform, serving as the final automated check before release approval
Reduced release check time from 2-3 days to under 24 hours by introducing parallel testing across mobile (iOS and Android) and browser test suites
Migrated and scripted automated tests from Ranorex onto Python, Robot Framework, Selenium, and Appium, covering front-end, backend admin panel, and mobile app testing
details: Built a Jenkins pipeline data generator used by testers to create 1000+ user records a month, and a tool to generate Jenkins pipeline scripts from JSON test configuration, streamlining test population
Collaborated with Manual QA to refine test scenarios and strengthen validation against production risk

positions.title: Associate Software QA Engineer
highlights: Bilingual (English/Japanese) QA for an OTA website — performed test design, planning, and execution
Tested on backend and frontend for LCM upgrades, regression coverage, and UI feature validation, using SQL queries to verify backend data and ensure successful release
Delivered ISTQB Foundation training for new QA members, supporting onboarding and skills development with 2 members passing after 6 months
details: Worked closely with developers, product managers, and other QA members to provide concrete testing strategy and efficient coverage, joining release operations and post-release monitoring as needed to avoid production issues
Contributed to improving internal test design templates, issue analysis, and reporting practices
Served as team's PiC for cross-team QA collaboration to streamline Manual-Automation workflows
